sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109261" key="u(po/stulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόστυλ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109261.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">resting on pillars set underneath,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἶκος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1390.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hecat.Abd.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
